component.name: Szyszka
component.summary: Simple but powerful file renamer, written in Rust

description.p: Szyszka is a simple, fast and powerful file renamer written in Rust.
This is a fork of the original Szyszka by Rafał Mikrut, rewritten with GTK 4 and libadwaita (GNOME HIG compliant).
First release of this fork, rebuilt on GTK 4 and libadwaita:

ul.li: Rewritten UI with GTK 4 and libadwaita, following the GNOME Human Interface Guidelines
Modernized main window with adaptive layout, native file/rule list views and sorting
Added drag-and-drop support for adding files
Added a progress dialog for renaming operations
Bundled the app icon as a GResource and added an About dialog
Added desktop entry and AppStream metadata for proper desktop integration
